events.title: Archduke Franz Ferdinand is assassinated in Sarajevo
Austria-Hungary declares war on Serbia

The First Battle of the Marne
The Battle of Tannenberg
The Sinking of the Lusitania
The Second Battle of Ypres introduces poison gas
The Gallipoli Campaign begins
The Battle of Verdun begins
The Battle of Jutland, the war's largest naval battle
The Battle of the Somme begins
Germany resumes unrestricted submarine warfare

The United States declares war on Germany
The Russian Revolution topples the tsar
Russia exits the war after the Bolshevik Revolution
Germany launches the Spring Offensive
The Battle of Belleau Wood
The Second Battle of the Marne
An armistice ends the fighting on the Western Front
The Treaty of Versailles is signed
The League of Nations is established
